summary: The diff shows modifications to backend/main.mo and project_state.json. The project_state.json architectural notes confirm the new principal gyojt-gsv7l-g3oqx-3m7xb-w7cmh-nck6r-so6sn-fc7jp-ymofr-fgq6n-eae was added to the hardcoded admin list alongside the two existing principals. However, the actual change in backend/main.mo is truncated and the access-control module file is not shown, so direct code evidence is incomplete. The project_state.json update strongly suggests the change was made.
